mapper.select: select * from course_grade_rule where course_id = #{courseId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into course_grade_rule(id, course_id, assignment_weight, checkin_weight, resource_weight, exam_weight) values (UUID_SHORT(), #{courseId}, #{assignmentWeight}, #{checkinWeight}, #{resourceWeight}, #{examWeight}) on duplicate key update assignment_weight = values(assignment_weight), checkin_weight = values(checkin_weight), resource_weight = values(resource_weight), exam_weight = values(exam_weight), updated_at = now()
